name: Dondelinger Hyundai
notes: CMS: Dealer.com (DDC) confirmed via DDC.postalCode cookie and Akamai CDN headers. Inventory probed via DDC WIAPI at /apis/widget/INVENTORY_LISTING_DEFAULT_AUTO_USED:inventory-data-bus1/getInventory. Total: 99 used vehicles listed. VIN overlap check against dondelinger-chevrolet.json: 90 of 99 VINs (91%) are identical to the Chevrolet rooftop feed, confirming shared campus pooled used inventory. 9 VINs unique to the Hyundai feed appear to be the same physical stock not yet reflected in the Chev feed (or vice versa) at time of extraction. To avoid double-counting in any aggregate analysis, this file is marked summary-only — full inventory is in dondelinger-chevrolet.json.
